[{"key":"0.61276041660352516","type":"illustrated-book","data":[{"key":"0.621db263ecdb","type":"tab-info","data":{"title":"","tabList":[{"key":"0.ecc481237e84","isShowTopDesc":false,"isShowBottomDesc":false,"title":"立绘-1","icon":"","content":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1138/h_579/50364/103682/2024/9/25/533545.png"],"type":"image"},{"key":"0.ab8be2dcb30cd","isShowTopDesc":false,"isShowBottomDesc":false,"title":"立绘-2","icon":"","content":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_784/h_859/50364/103682/2024/9/25/324507.png"],"type":"image"}]}},{"key":"0.2901012303f4a","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"基本资料","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"勉"}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"异格者协会评定"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"异格者勉，身份编码S09-113008，Re-A芯片状态正常，未见异常波动。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"蜃都地区问心武馆的当代馆主。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"为人严谨、沉稳，将家族传承视为一切。恪守传统与道义，行事一板一眼，有时甚至显得有些不近人情。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"姐姐问心去世后便肩负起了武馆的责任，面对蜃海地下帮派和「DOKI」娱乐操控的明争暗斗，其一直保护问心武馆远离旋涡中心，独善其身。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"非常重视自己作为剑士的荣誉，看不起那些使用阴谋诡计、暗箭伤人的宵小之辈。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"对唯一的妹妹胧十分宠爱，但从不表露出来。"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.bfc12efaafc","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"稀有度"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"SR"}]}]}},{"key":"0.502fb7b7fb545","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"原质属性"}]}]} howOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/530081.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"基础属性提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"基础攻击力、防御力和生命值提升"},{"text":"5%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.901c446764fac8","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/389425.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"暴击伤害提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"暴击伤害"},{"text":"+12%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.b5b0e217a380b","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/357114.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"伤害提升和伤害减免","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"造成伤害额外提升"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"，受到伤害额外降低"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]}]}},{"key":"0.8fb62f21e416a","type":"skill-info","data":{"title":"异格档案","isShowTabs":true,"tabs":[{"key":"0.b059cc403d5a6","label":"记忆片段Ⅰ"},{"key":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","label":"记忆片段Ⅱ"},{"key":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","label":"记忆片段Ⅲ"}],"skillList":[{"key":"0.1c98b1326610d","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.b059cc403d5a6","icon":"","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"记忆片段|"}]}]},"label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【磐叶新狩。】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"在蜃海的某个僻静的街区深处，有一座古旧的问心武馆。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"问心武馆的大门常年紧闭，鲜少看见有人出入，但若是站在高处眺望，倒是能瞥见武馆中的状况。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"武馆中的门徒们整日在偌大的演武场上修习武术，认真操练，其中有一位年轻的教官严肃地穿行于他们之间。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"据悉那位年轻的教官便是现今问心武馆的馆主，勉。他总是颇为严厉地指导着门徒们的一招一式，有时甚至到了不近人情的地步。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"——麦琪的蜃海街区调查手记·其十二"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果","iconSize":{"width":"60px","height":"60px"}},{"key":"0.ad923e74cde51","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【沉渊泓洄。】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"问心武馆已经有些年头没再招收新门徒了。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"但若是有人诚心上门，又运气颇好，或许能有一线希望得见馆主本人。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"勉家主会亲自赠予你一把称手的武器，并邀请你七日之后登门对决。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"请放心，这并非故意刁难，而是对习武之人的「历练」。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"只要你能接住勉家主一招而不倒下，那么就能成为问心武馆的一员。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"——麦琪的蜃海街区调查手记·其十五"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"},{"key":"0.021e73c84bff8","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【雏隼，终会翱翔于旷野。】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"听说美梦俱乐部的大主管，胧，正是这位勉家主的妹妹。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"而武馆的前任馆主，问心，则是他们两人的姐姐。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"据说在问心意外离世后，勉与胧曾爆发过一次争吵，之后两人便分道扬镳，不复相见。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"我曾了解过，胧一直在暗中调查着什么，而那背后的线索，似乎正是指向当年的问心。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"而勉似乎也并不像传闻中那样与胧恩断义绝，反倒在通过某种方式悄悄支持着她。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"——麦琪的蜃海街区调查手记·其十九"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"}]}},{"key":"0.f1b554cf2b0d38","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"推荐搭配","name":"名称","descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"角色简评"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【战术定位】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"输出"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【养成建议】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"┌─────────┬────────────┐"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 技能优先级 | 555|"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 源器配置 | 右三主属性3暴击伤害 |"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"└─────────┴────────────┘"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【对局表现】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"独特的攻击减益状态必定暴击，源器全堆爆伤把伤害提升到极致，配合克罗斯附加减益后实现封锁和伤害的双重打击"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.e38cf8c43e8468","isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐源器"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"12洞悉穿刺+8狂怒+6极影强袭"}]}]}},{"key":"0.653e5448f76fa8","isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐智壳"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"伯爵"}]}]}}],"imageSize":{"width":"160px","height":"160px"},"imagesList":[],"imageList":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_300/h_242/50364/842288/2025/7/18/132196.png"]}}],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"key":"1eXEi0g0y93eJYCv","type":"illustrated-book","data":[],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]
